text.message: This is crazy. I’ve agreed to two threats and been hit both times with the worst set up
I’m obviously not playing those games anymore
only 6 brick is a shared block for you red
I’d love to play orange here
red has city in hand now
guess we need to work together now?
we need to move past the past man
would you rather give up and not even try now?
Na I’m just not gonna feed you help when you went out of your way with OJ to ruin my game for no reason
I can offer good cards if you want
Like it made no sense to target me but you both did
for me it made sense, racing to wood harbor
I can help you with LR if you want blue
Help me take road he reckons
I hit you next guaranteed buddy
I am willing to help you
You just hit me? When you want me to take road
and I am gonna feed all my bricks to you
so that 6 brick doesnt hurt you at all
It doesn’t hurt him. You’d hit 3 sheep if you were being fair dinkum
All I’m saying. Is I will definitely hit you if you try slow me down again
and I will give you 2 bricks for 1 card mate
Again, I am not slowing you down by any means
red could take both road and army
why are you so sour mate
you may be just a pull away from winning
Remember when black wasted a robber and ade me waste a robber as well
We could have pinned down the 8 wood
and he sttles instead of dev
no way to know that red would roll so good early game
Yeah the guys is joking around I’m fairly sure
and 2 ores to red was the game ender
I’ve played with people like this before
yeah, but we need to try at least
You haven’t tried once this game black ?
Like you aren’t trying to win
sad part is that I might loose to oj
nah, I think you only will win here red
Think about all the moves they’ve made
I could have played bad, I kind of agree
No you haven’t. It has all been deliberate
I didn’t see that at first so that’s on me
you can watch the replay blue
dont give it to oj he just wins
I did say yes to the trafe
you also would be on 9 with that
Can’t you just troll on Facebook or something. Like go away black. I haven’t even hit you once all game
I don’t even know what that rating means
I’ve never been more irritated by a player haha
